name: Skip Martin
abstract: Lloyd Vernon "Skip" Martin (May 14, 1916 – February 12, 1976) was an American jazz saxophonist, clarinetist, and arranger.

about_quotes.speaker: Charlie Barnet
about_quotes.evidence: some of them were done by a guy that was playing in our band, Skippy Martin.

about_quotes.speaker: Buddy Tate
about_quotes.evidence: He bought arrangements from everybody -- Skip Martin, Skip, I think, wrote 'Miss Thing.' Skip is a white saxophone player.
